name: Creme D'artichaux Aux Huitres
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in butter in a large skillet until wilted.
2. Add the oysters and their liquid to the skillet. Simmer very gently, just until the oysters plump slightly on the edges. Do not overcook. Remove the oysters immediately with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Add the chicken stock to the skillet.
4. Drain the artichokes and add their juices to the stock in the pan. Add tarragon, chervil, salt, and pepper. Simmer the mixture uncovered until it reduces to about 3 cups.
5. Place 1 cup of the stock in a blender with the artichoke hearts. Blend or chop the artichokes finely (if using a blender). Return the artichoke mixture to the skillet with the rest of the ingredients.
6. Simmer for about 10 minutes to blend the flavors.
7. Just before serving, heat the soup to boiling. Reduce heat and add the cream and poached oysters. Correct salt and pepper. Return the soup to a simmer. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
Serves 6 as an appetizer.
